creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/libtool fails to stage on 8.4 or 9.3:

===>   Generating temporary packing list
CDPATH="${ZSH_VERSION+.}:" && cd . && /bin/sh /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/libtool/work/libtool-2.4.6/build-aux/missing aclocal-1.15 -I m4
aclocal-1.15: not found
WARNING: 'aclocal-1.15' is missing on your system.
         You should only need it if you modified 'acinclude.m4' or
         'configure.ac' or m4 files included by 'configure.ac'.
         The 'aclocal' program is part of the GNU Automake package:
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/automake>
         It also requires GNU Autoconf, GNU m4 and Perl in order to run:
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/autoconf>
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/m4/>
         <http://www.perl.org/>
*** Error code 127
